itinerary.title: Premium Luxury Mizoram Tour
itinerary.tagline: Aizawl Luxury • Reiek Heritage Retreat • Phawngpui Blue Mountain • Pukzing Caves • Cultural Immersion
itinerary.overview:
TRAGUIN PREMIUM LUXURY MIZORAM TOUR — Aizawl Luxury • Reiek Heritage Retreat • Phawngpui Blue Mountain • Pukzing Caves • Cultural Immersion. 05 Nights / 06 Days Premium Mizoram Sovereign Exploration.

TOUR OVERVIEW
Discover the untouched beauty and cultural sophistication of Mizoram with this TRAGUIN curated luxury journey. Designed for those seeking comfort amidst wild nature, this Luxury Mizoram itinerary combines premium accommodations, guided cultural insights, and breathtaking scenic explorations, guaranteeing unforgettable memories in Northeast India's pristine hills.
itinerary.seo_title: MZ-004 | Premium Luxury Mizoram Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Mizoram package (MZ-004 / TRG-MIZ-LUX-2026): Aizawl Luxury • Reiek Heritage Retreat • Phawngpui Blue Mountain • Pukzing Caves • Cultural Immersion with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 01: ARRIVAL IN AIZAWL & LUXURY CHECK-IN
TRAGUIN curated Premium Luxury Mizoram Tour with handpicked premium stays
Vehicle / Meals: Luxury SUV / MAPAI (Breakfast & Dinner)

days.title: ARRIVAL IN AIZAWL & LUXURY CHECK-IN
days.description: Arrive in Aizawl, private transfer to your premium hotel. Enjoy a curated welcome dinner with stunning mountain vistas.
activities: Curated welcome dinner with mountain vistas.

days.title: CULTURE & HANDICRAFT EXPLORATION
days.description: Private guided tour of the Mizoram State Museum and traditional handicraft centers, exploring the local art and iconic attractions.
activities: Private guided museum and handicraft tour.
Local art and iconic attractions exploration.

days.title: REIEK HERITAGE RETREAT
days.description: Exclusive visit to the Reiek Heritage Village, enjoying traditional architecture and spectacular scenic beauty in total comfort.

days.title: PHAWNGPUI BLUE MOUNTAIN SOJOURN
days.description: Journey to Phawngpui, the Blue Mountain. Experience the breathtaking landscapes of this sacred peak with a private nature guide.
activities: Private nature guide and breathtaking landscapes.

days.title: PUKZING CAVES & FAREWELL DINNER
days.description: Visit the legendary Pukzing Caves and indulge in a private farewell fine-dining experience celebrating Mizo cuisine, creating unforgettable memories.
activities: Private farewell fine-dining celebrating Mizo cuisine.
Meals Included: MAPAI Breakfast & Farewell Dinner

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer, completing your premium Mizoram experience.

inclusions.text: Premium Stays: 5 Nights in handpicked Mizoram properties as per chosen category.
Luxury Transportation: Private dedicated Luxury SUV for all transfers and sightseeing.
Curated Meal Plan: MAPAI — daily breakfast and dinner at handpicked venues.
TRAGUIN Support: 24/7 dedicated guest experience manager on call.
Private Transfers: Airport/railway arrival and departure transfers in premium AC vehicle.
Handpicked Stays: TRAGUIN-vetted accommodations matching your selected tier.
All applicable taxes, driver allowances, tolls, and parking charges for the private vehicle.
Private guided cultural insights and luxury scenic explorations including Reiek, Phawngpui, and Pukzing Caves.
Airfare, domestic flight bookings, or train tickets.
Monument entry tickets, camera permits, or sanctuary entry fees.
Personal expenses such as laundry, phone calls, drinks, and tips.
Travel insurance, medical expenses, and any emergency evacuation costs.
